use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct WebhookEvent {
    pub event_type: String,
    pub status: String,
    pub priority: String,
}

#[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct UserAction {
    pub action: String,
    pub resource_type: String,
    pub severity: String,
}

fn match_event_type(event: &WebhookEvent) -> &'static str {
    match event.event_type.as_str() {
        "user.created" => "new_user",
        "user.deleted" => "removed",
        _ => "unknown",
    }
}

fn check_status(status: &str) -> bool {
    match status {
        "active" | "pending" | "suspended" => true,
        _ => false,
    }
}
